name: Rescored NPC analysis supported slower progression with arimoclomol
summary: A post-hoc rescored 4-domain analysis of the same NPC trial supported the approval-era functional signal.
statement: A post-hoc analysis using the rescored 4-domain NPC Clinical Severity Scale reported less progression with arimoclomol than placebo.
population_or_model: Participants from the arimoclomol NPC-002 randomized trial
quantitative_note: Reported R4DNPCCSS change was 0.35 with arimoclomol versus 2.05 with placebo; treatment effect -1.70, P=0.0155.
caveats: This is a post-hoc analysis of the same small pivotal trial, not an independent replication.
The rescored scale supports the regulatory context but does not broaden the evidence beyond NPC.
Several authors were affiliated with or connected to the product sponsor.
